debug_info.goal:
V : Type u
inst : DecidableEq V
G : SimpleGraph V
u v_1 ih w w_1 : V
p_1 : @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk V G w ih
h_ind :
  Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G w ih inst p_1) ≤
    Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G w ih inst p_1) + 1
h : G.Adj w_1 w
h_support :
  @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G w_1 ih inst (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.cons V G w_1 w ih h p_1) =
    insert w_1 (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G w ih inst p_1)
h_edge :
  @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G w_1 ih inst (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.cons V G w_1 w ih h p_1) =
    @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G w ih inst p_1
hv : w_1 ∉ @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G w ih inst p_1
H : s(w_1, w) ∈ @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G w ih inst p_1
left : (w, w_1) ∈ @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts V G w ih p_1
right : @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.dartEdge V (w, w_1) = s(w_1, w)
⊢ w_1 ∈ @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support V G w ih p_1

failed_attempts: induction p_1 <;> simp_all [darts, support] <;> aesop
induction p_1 <;> simp [darts, support] at * <;> rintro (⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h) <;> (try { right; cases ‹G.LoopWalk _ _› }) <;> aesop

· exact Or.inl rfl
              · exact Or.inr (ih' _ _ h_in)
simp [darts, support] at * <;> aesop

induction p_1 with
              | nil => cases left
              | cons h' p' ih' =>
                cases left with
                | head h_eq => injection h_eq with _ h_w1; rw [h_w1]; simp [support]; right; cases p' <;> simp [support]
                | tail h_mem => simp [support, ih' h_mem]
              | loop p' ih' =>
                cases left with
                | head h_eq => injection h_eq with _ h_w1; rw [h_w1]; simp [support]
                | tail h_mem => simp [support, ih' h_mem]

| nil => cases left
            | cons _ p ih' =>
              cases left
              · simp [support]; cases p <;> simp [support]
              · simp [support, ih' ‹_›]
            | loop p ih' =>
              cases left
              · simp [support]
              · simp [support, ih' ‹_›]

| nil => cases left
            | cons _ p' ih =>
              cases left with
              | head h => cases h; cases p' <;> simp [support]
              | tail h => simp [support]; exact Or.inr (ih h)
            | loop p' ih =>
              cases left with
              | head h => cases h; simp [support]
              | tail h => simp [support]; exact Or.inr (ih h)

intro u v p; induction p <;> simp [support, *]
            induction p_1 <;> simp [darts, support] at *
            · cases left
            · rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h_in <;> simp [h_mem, *]
            · rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h_in <;> simp [h_mem, *]

· exact Or.inr (by cases ‹LoopWalk _ _› <;> simp [support])
              · exact Or.inr (‹_› h_in)
            · simp [darts, support] at left ⊢
              rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h_in
              · exact Or.inl rfl
              · exact Or.inr (‹_› h_in)

induction p_1 <;> simp [darts, support] at *
              · contradiction
              · rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h
                · exact .inr (by cases ‹LoopWalk _ _› <;> simp [support])
                · exact .inr (‹_› h)
              · rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h
                · exact .inl rfl
                · exact .inr (‹_› h)
induction p_1 <;> simp_all [LoopWalk.darts, LoopWalk.support] <;> aesop

induction p_1 generalizing w w_1 ih
              case nil => cases left
              case cons _ p ih_p =>
                simp [darts, support] at left ⊢
                rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h_in
                · right; cases p <;> simp [support]
                · right; exact ih_p h_in
              case loop p ih_p =>
                simp [darts, support] at left ⊢
                rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h_in
                · left; rfl
                · right; exact ih_p h_in

| nil => intro _ _ h; cases h
            | cons _ p ih' =>
              intro w w_1 h; simp [darts, support] at h ⊢
              rcases h with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h_mem
              · right; cases p <;> simp [support]
              · right; exact ih' h_mem
            | loop p ih' =>
              intro w w_1 h; simp [darts, support] at h ⊢
              rcases h with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h_mem
              · left; rfl
              · right; exact ih' h_mem
induction p_1 <;> simp_all [support, darts] <;> rcases left with h | h <;> (try injection h with _ h_w1; subst h_w1; cases ‹LoopWalk _ _›) <;> simp_all [support]

induction p with
            | nil => simp [support, darts]
            | cons _ p ih | loop p ih => simp [support, darts, ih]
          rw [h_sup p_1]
          exact List.mem_cons_of_mem _ (List.mem_map_of_mem Prod.snd left)
induction p_1 <;> simp [LoopWalk.darts, LoopWalk.support] at * <;> aesop

induction p_1 generalizing w with
              | nil => cases left
              | cons _ p p_ih =>
                simp [darts, support] at left ⊢
                rcases left with rfl | h_tail
                · exact Or.inr (by cases p <;> simp [support])
                · exact Or.inr (p_ih h_tail)
              | loop p p_ih =>
                simp [darts, support] at left ⊢
                rcases left with rfl | h_tail
                · exact Or.inl rfl
                · exact Or.inr (p_ih h_tail)

induction p_1
              · cases left
              · simp [darts, support] at left ⊢
                rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h_mem
                · right; cases ‹LoopWalk _ _› <;> simp [support]
                · right; assumption
              · simp [darts, support] at left ⊢
                rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h_mem
                · simp
                · right; assumption

induction p_1 with
              | nil => contradiction
              | cons _ p' ih' =>
                simp [darts, support] at left ⊢
                rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | hmem
                · right; cases p' <;> simp [support]
                · right; exact ih' hmem
              | loop p' ih' =>
                simp [darts, support] at left ⊢
                rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | hmem
                · simp
                · right; exact ih' hmem

simp [darts, support] at left ⊢
              rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h_in
              · left; rfl
              · right; exact ih_p h_in

simp [darts, support] at left ⊢
              rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h_in
              · right; cases p <;> simp [support]
              · right; exact ih_p h_in
            | loop p ih_p =>
              simp [darts, support] at left ⊢
              rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h_in
              · simp
              · right; exact ih_p h_in

induction p_1 with
              | nil => cases left
              | cons h p ih_1 =>
                cases left with
                | head => simp [support]; cases p <;> simp [support]
                | tail h_mem => simp [support, ih_1 h_mem]
              | loop p ih_1 =>
                cases left with
                | head => simp [support]
                | tail h_mem => simp [support, ih_1 h_mem]

induction p_1
              · simp [darts] at left
              · simp [darts, support] at *; rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | hmem
                · right; cases ‹LoopWalk _ _› <;> simp [support]
                · right; exact p_ih hmem
              · simp [darts, support] at *; rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | hmem
                · left; rfl
                · right; exact p_ih hmem

have h_supp : ∀ {x y} (q : G.LoopWalk x y), q.support = x :: q.darts.map Prod.snd := by
                intro x y q; induction q <;> simp [support, darts, *]
              rw [h_supp p_1]
              exact List.mem_cons_of_mem _ (List.mem_map_of_mem Prod.snd left)
simp [support, darts] at * <;> aesop

· exact List.mem_cons_of_mem _ (by cases p <;> simp [LoopWalk.support])
              · exact List.mem_cons_of_mem _ (p_ih _ h_in)
            | loop p p_ih =>
              rw [LoopWalk.darts, LoopWalk.support] at left ⊢
              rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h_in
              · exact List.mem_cons_self _ _
              · exact List.mem_cons_of_mem _ (p_ih _ h_in)
induction p_1 <;> aesop (add simp [darts, support])

induction p_1 generalizing w w_1 <;> simp [darts, support] at left ⊢
              · cases left
              · rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h_mem
                · exact Or.inr (by cases ‹G.LoopWalk _ _› <;> simp [support])
                · exact Or.inr (‹_› h_mem)
              · rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h_mem
                · exact Or.inl rfl
                · exact Or.inr (‹_› h_mem)

induction p_1 with
              | nil => cases left
              | cons _ p ih =>
                simp [darts, support] at left ⊢
                rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h_in
                · right; cases p <;> simp [support]
                · right; exact ih h_in
              | loop p ih =>
                simp [darts, support] at left ⊢
                rcases left with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h_in
                · left; rfl
                · right; exact ih h_in
induction p_1 <;> aesop

simp [darts, support] at left ⊢
              rcases left with rfl | h_in
              · right; cases p' <;> simp [support]
              · exact .inr (ih' h_in)
            case loop u' v' p' ih' =>
              simp [darts, support] at left ⊢
              rcases left with rfl | h_in
              · exact .inl rfl
              · exact .inr (ih' h_in)
induction p_1 <;> simp_all [LoopWalk.darts, LoopWalk.support] <;> aesop
